title: convolvulus demissus
intro: Convolvulus demissus, also known as the trailing glory vine, is a perennial flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Convolvulus demissus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Convolvulus demissus is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used topically to promote skin health and reduce the appearance of scars and stretch marks.
